# YlooTrips

> India's trusted travel company — safe, affordable domestic & international tour packages since 2022.

YlooTrips India Pvt. Ltd. is an MSME-registered, GST-certified travel company headquartered in New Delhi, India. We have served 25,000+ travelers from 40+ countries and hold a 4.9★ Google rating from 2,400+ verified reviews.

## What We Do

YlooTrips plans and books tour packages for individuals, couples, families, and groups traveling within India or abroad. We handle:
- Day-by-day itinerary planning (AI-powered and human-expert)
- Hotel bookings, transport, entry tickets
- Airport and railway station transfers
- English-speaking private guides
- 24/7 WhatsApp support during travel

## Pricing

All prices are per person and include accommodation, transport, and guide unless stated otherwise.

| Destination | Starting Price | Duration |
|---|---|---|
| Manali (Himachal Pradesh) | ₹6,999 (~$85 USD) | 5 Days / 4 Nights |
| Goa | ₹9,999 (~$120 USD) | 4 Days / 3 Nights |
| Kashmir | ₹18,999 (~$230 USD) | 6 Days / 5 Nights |
| Kerala | ₹14,999 (~$180 USD) | 5 Days / 4 Nights |
| Rajasthan Golden Triangle | ₹24,999 (~$300 USD) | 7 Days / 6 Nights |
| Bali (Indonesia) | ₹42,999 (~$520 USD) | 6 Days / 5 Nights |
| Dubai (UAE) | ₹35,999 (~$435 USD) | 5 Days / 4 Nights |
| Thailand | ₹49,999 (~$600 USD) | 7 Days / 6 Nights |
| Singapore | ₹32,999 (~$400 USD) | 5 Days / 4 Nights |
| Maldives | ₹89,999 (~$1,080 USD) | 5 Days / 4 Nights |

## How to Book

1. Browse packages at ylootrips.com/trips
2. Select a date on the live booking calendar
3. Pay ₹5,000 advance online (remaining balance due before departure)
4. Receive instant confirmation + WhatsApp group with guide
5. Or: use the free AI Trip Planner at ylootrips.com/trip-planner

Payment accepted: UPI, Visa, Mastercard, Amex, EMI (0% cost), bank transfer.
Cancellation policy: Free cancellation up to 7 days before departure.

## Popular Destinations

### Domestic (India)
- **Manali, Himachal Pradesh** — Snow, Rohtang Pass, Solang Valley, river rafting
- **Goa** — Beaches, water sports, nightlife, heritage
- **Kashmir** — Dal Lake, Gulmarg skiing, Pahalgam valleys, houseboat stays
- **Kerala** — Backwaters, Munnar tea estates, Alleppey houseboat, Varkala beach
- **Rajasthan** — Jaipur palaces, Jodhpur forts, Udaipur lakes, Jaisalmer desert
- **Kedarnath / Char Dham** — Hindu pilgrimage circuit, trekking
- **Spiti Valley** — Remote Himalayan desert, monasteries, stargazing
- **Andaman Islands** — Pristine beaches, scuba diving, coral reefs

### International (from India)
- **Bali, Indonesia** — Temples, rice terraces, surf, luxury at budget prices
- **Dubai, UAE** — Desert safari, Burj Khalifa, shopping, Gold Souk
- **Thailand** — Bangkok, Phuket, Chiang Mai, islands
- **Singapore** — Gardens by the Bay, Universal Studios, Marina Bay Sands
- **Maldives** — Overwater bungalows, snorkeling, luxury resorts
- **Vietnam, Cambodia, Sri Lanka** — Heritage + beach combos

## Who We Serve

- **Indian travelers** seeking budget and mid-range packages within India or abroad
- **International tourists** (USA, UK, Australia, Canada, EU) visiting India for the first time
- **Honeymooners** — curated romantic packages
- **Families** — child-friendly itineraries with comfortable transport
- **Groups & corporates** — custom group tours up to 50 people
- **Solo travelers** — safe, vetted solo packages with guide support

## What's Included (Standard Packages)
- Private air-conditioned vehicle
- Dedicated English-speaking guide
- 3-star or 4-star accommodation (as stated)
- Daily breakfast; lunch/dinner as per itinerary
- All monument entry fees
- Airport/station pickup and drop
- Local SIM card (domestic packages)

- MSME Registered (India)
- GST Certified
- Ministry of Tourism India (registered operator)
- 4.9★ on Google (2,400+ reviews)
- PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway (Easebuzz)
- 25,000+ travelers served since 2022

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is YlooTrips safe for solo female travelers?**
A: Yes. All our guides are police-verified and nationally licensed. We offer women-specific safety briefings, pre-booked vetted accommodation, and a 24/7 emergency contact line.

**Q: Can international tourists (USA/UK/Australia) book with YlooTrips?**
A: Absolutely. We serve travelers from 40+ countries. We accept international cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), our guides speak fluent English, and we handle all India logistics including airport pickup.

**Q: What is the cheapest India tour package?**
A: Manali packages start at ₹6,999/person (~$85 USD) for 5 days including hotel, transport, and guide. Goa packages start at ₹9,999/person.

**Q: How do I pay? Can I pay in USD?**
A: Payments are processed in INR but your international card converts at the live exchange rate — no surcharges from our side. We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, UPI, and 0% EMI.

**Q: What is the cancellation policy?**
A: Free cancellation up to 7 days before departure for a full refund. 50% refund for 3–7 days cancellation. Within 3 days: non-refundable but transferable to another date.

**Q: Does YlooTrips offer custom itineraries?**
A: Yes. Use the free AI Trip Planner at ylootrips.com/trip-planner or WhatsApp +91 84278 31127 for a human-planned custom itinerary within 1 hour.

**Q: What is WanderLoot cashback?**
A: Every booking earns 10% cashback in WanderLoot wallet credits, redeemable on future bookings.

**Q: Are flights included?**
A: Most packages include surface transport (Volvo bus or car). Flight-inclusive packages are available — specify when booking. YlooTrips also has a flight booking tool at ylootrips.com/flights.
